mapper.sql: id, employee_id, company_name, job_title, start_date, end_date, description, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM work_experiences WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY end_date DESC NULLS LAST, start_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE work_experiences SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, company_name = #{companyName}, job_title = #{jobTitle}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM work_experiences WHERE id = #{id})
